description.value: > Divine Associated Domain: Magic. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the hand of the acolyte power of the Magic domain. Divine Vessel (Su): Whenever you are the target of a divine spell, you can, as a swift action, grant each ally within 15 feet of you a divine boon. This boon grants a +2 bonus on the next attack roll, skill check, or ability check made before the end of their next turn. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 2nd levelâ bless water, 5thâ cleanse, 7thâ resurrection, 9thâ miracle.
